result.stdout:
UnderTest.GlobalTool v0.1.0

Usage
  undertest [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  add               Add an UnderTest element to your current project.
  feedback          Send feedback on this tool.
  init              Setup a new project.
  lint              Lint features in the current folder.
  setup             Setup a new project interactively.
  stats             Probe the current project for specific stats.
  update            Update UnderTest tooling.

You can run `undertest [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
UnderTest.GlobalTool v0.1.0

Usage
  undertest [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  add               Add an UnderTest element to your current project.
  feedback          Send feedback on this tool.
  init              Setup a new project.
  lint              Lint features in the current folder.
  setup             Setup a new project interactively.
  stats             Probe the current project for specific stats.
  update            Update UnderTest tooling.

You can run `undertest [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Description
  Add an UnderTest element to your current project.

Usage
  undertest add [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

Commands
  feature           Setup a new gherkin Feature file.
  featurehandler    Setup a new FeatureHandler.
  featureservice    Setup a new Feature Service.
  stepparam         Setup a new Step Parameter.

You can run `undertest add [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
Description
  Add an UnderTest element to your current project.

Usage
  undertest add [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

Commands
  feature           Setup a new gherkin Feature file.
  featurehandler    Setup a new FeatureHandler.
  featureservice    Setup a new Feature Service.
  stepparam         Setup a new Step Parameter.

You can run `undertest add [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Description
  Setup a new gherkin Feature file.

Usage
  undertest add feature <Feature name> [options]

Parameters
* Feature name      The name of your feature. 

Options
  -f|--force        Forces content to be generated even if it would change existing files. Default: "False".
  -v|--verbose      Verbose output. Default: "False".
  -a|--askme        Prompt for each of the parameters. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

  -a|--askme        Prompt for each of the parameters. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Description
  Setup a new FeatureHandler.

Usage
  undertest add featurehandler <Handler name> [options]

Parameters
* Handler name      The name of your handler. 

Options
  -n|--namespace    The target namespace for your handler. 
  -s|--is-selenium  Is this a Selenium FeatureHandler? Default: "False".
  -a|--askme        Prompt for each of the parameters. Default: "False".
  -v|--verbose      Verbose output. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Description
  Setup a new project.

Usage
  undertest init <Project name> [options]

Parameters
* Project name      The name of your UnderTest project. 

Options
  -e|--no-examples  Skip the addition of example feature and handler. Default: "False".
  -r|--no-restore   Skips the execution of 'dotnet restore' on project creation. Default: "False".
  -t|--treat-warnings-as-errors  Treat warnings as errors. Default: "False".
  -v|--verbose      Verbose output. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

  -t|--treat-warnings-as-errors  Treat warnings as errors. Default: "False".
  -v|--verbose      Verbose output. Default: "False".

result.stdout:
Description
  Lint features in the current folder.

Usage
  undertest lint [options]

Options
  --files           Input filepath(s).  Supports globs, absolute and relative paths. Default: "**/*.feature".
  -v|--verbose      Verbose output. Default: "False".
  --json            Display lint results as JSON Default: "False".
  --config          Display the current configuration as JSON Default: "False".
  --ignore-tags     tags to ignore when linting Default: "featurelint-ignore".
  --warnings-are-errors  Treat warnings as errors Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:

Usage

Options

  --json            Display lint results as JSON Default: "False".
  --config          Display the current configuration as JSON Default: "False".
  --ignore-tags     tags to ignore when linting Default: "featurelint-ignore".
  --warnings-are-errors  Treat warnings as errors Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

Description
  Probe the current project for specific stats.

Usage
  undertest stats [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

Commands
  features          Count the features/scenarios.

You can run `undertest stats [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.
